summary: First backend regression run for Placement Intelligence Ecosystem. Built /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covering health, auth (register/login/me + RBAC errors), demo seed logins, resume LLM analyze + persistence, prediction, jobs CRUD + RBAC, matching (recommendations + shortlist), interview (start/message/list with real Claude calls), and analytics. All 20 tests pass against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET in /app/backend/.env is a placeholder ('change_in_prod') — rotate before production.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True; browsers reject credentialed requests with wildcard origins. Set explicit origins in production.
Resume analyze keeps only one active resume per user (delete_many then insert). Intentional per spec, but consider versioning history for analytics over time.

Funnel 'shortlisted' and 'placed' values in /api/analytics/overview are derived heuristically (0.55x, 0.42x) rather than from real shortlist/placement records — fine for MVP but flag as mocked metric.

POST /api/jobs allows both 'recruiter' and 'coordinator' but DELETE /api/jobs/{id} filters by posted_by=current user — coordinator-posted jobs cannot be deleted by recruiter and vice versa (correct), but no admin override exists.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); prefer FastAPI lifespan context for forward compatibility.
server.py is ~510 lines — still under the 700 threshold but starting to accumulate; consider splitting routers (auth, resume, jobs, interview, analytics) for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: No additional seed needed — startup seed_demo() created 3 demo users + 5 extra students + 6 jobs. Note: seed.py has 6 jobs, not 7 as mentioned in review request; test relaxed to >=6.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs verified end-to-end including real Claude Sonnet 4.5 calls (resume analyze ~5s, interview start/message ~5-8s each). Test file is pytest-based and idempotent. Demo seed only runs when users collection is empty; subsequent runs rely on existing seeded data. JWT auth flow, RBAC (student/coordinator/recruiter), Mongo persistence and LLM integration all green.
rca of the issue: N/A — no production issues found. One test assertion bug (email case) was fixed during the run since backend correctly lowercases emails on register.
